suite.name: LuxFlow
suite.headline: Creative systems for the Lux Veritas universe.
suite.summary: LuxFlow apps help creators, artists, operators, and partners shape releases, worlds, visuals, publishing, and fan pathways, with each layer opening at the right level of access.

apps.name: CR8
apps.headline: Create from the source.
apps.shortDescription: A LuxFlow creator app for shaping media ideas, release assets, prompts, and creative packages into reviewable next steps.
apps.audience: Artists, creators, and creative operators preparing work for review, release, or collaboration.

previewScreens.title: Start with the raw idea.
previewScreens.body: Collect the song, scene, visual, drop, or campaign thought before it gets lost.

previewScreens.title: Turn fragments into a packet.
previewScreens.body: CR8 frames the work into a reviewable brief with creative direction and next steps.

previewScreens.title: Move only what is ready.
previewScreens.body: Export a clean package for submission, collaboration, or future release review.

waitlistTiers.name: First Access
waitlistTiers.body: For fans and creators who want early notice when CR8 opens.

waitlistTiers.name: Creator Seat
waitlistTiers.body: For artists, writers, designers, and builders preparing active creative work.

waitlistTiers.name: Studio Circle
waitlistTiers.body: For teams and partners that need a cleaner path from idea to review.

appStore.subtitle: Creative packets for artists
appStore.description: CR8 helps creators shape ideas, prompts, assets, and release thoughts into clean packets for review, collaboration, and future release pathways.

googlePlay.shortDescription: Shape ideas, prompts, and creative assets into reviewable packets.
googlePlay.fullDescription: CR8 is a creator app from Lux Veritas for capturing raw ideas, shaping them into structured creative packets, and preparing work for review, collaboration, or future release paths. Start with the source, clarify the signal, and move only what is ready.

conversion.headline: The first door is simple.
conversion.body: Join the CR8 waitlist to receive launch updates, store availability, beta invitations, and early creator access opportunities.

apps.name: CanonCraft
apps.headline: Keep worlds coherent.
apps.shortDescription: A public-facing doorway for future canon, lore, timeline, character, and story-continuity workflows.
apps.audience: Story teams, creators, writers, and worldbuilders preparing coherent media universes.

apps.name: SignalCraft
apps.headline: Turn attention into signal.
apps.shortDescription: A public-facing doorway for future release messaging, audience paths, and content signal planning.
apps.audience: Artists, labels, studios, and operators preparing campaigns with restraint and clarity.

apps.name: RealCraft
apps.headline: Make images feel lived in.
apps.shortDescription: A public-facing doorway for future visual realism, style, wardrobe, environment, and prompt-export workflows.
apps.audience: Visual artists, filmmakers, fashion teams, and creators developing coherent image systems.

apps.name: PromptOps
apps.headline: Turn repeat work into clean prompts.
apps.shortDescription: A public-facing doorway for future prompt workflows, content commands, decision support, and reusable operating patterns.
apps.audience: Founders, creators, teams, and operators who need repeatable creative and business workflows.
